subject: Re: LSJ Lady G crew boat
body:
buy new turbos


----- Original Message ----
From: "Miles Alexander, LSJ" <littlestjames@yahoo.com>
To: Jeffery E Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Cc: Emad Hanna <ehanna@nysgmail.com>; Rich Kahn <rkahn@nysgmail.com>; Daphne Wallace <daphnelwallace@yahoo.com>
Sent: Saturday, April 14, 2007 9:37:00 AM
Subject: LSJ Lady G crew boat


Greetings
 
The crew boat Lady G blew a turbo on one engine on the way back to St Thomas last night. I have arranged for Jeremy ( part time boat cpt) to strip the turbo and report on damage. The fix may require purchasing new turbos. Monday will be the earliest we can check on suppliers for parts or new turbos.
 
In the mean time I have arranged for water taxi to do the staff runs.
 
Trust that this is in order
 
Regards
 
Miles



Mr Miles Alexander 
Little St James Island, 6100 Red Hook Qrts B3, St Thomas, USVI, USA. 00802-1348
Phone : 340-5139855, Fax : 340-7758108, Email : littlestjames@yahoo.com

__________________________________________________
